recalls.Description: Sanven Technology has announced a recall of Vevor's wrought iron single post handrails designed for one or two-step stairs. These handrails are available in black, white, and silver, with specific model numbers for each color. The brand name 'Vevor' can be found on a label near the bottom of the handrail, while the model number is located on the product packaging.
recalls.Title: Sanven Technology Issues Recall for Vevor Single Post Handrails Due to Potential Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled handrails immediately. For assistance, contact Sanven Technology at 855-599-6320, Monday through Friday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, email recalling@vevor.com, or visit https://www.vevor.com/pages/vevor-single-post-handrail for more details.

Products.Name: Vevor Wrought Iron Single Post Handrails

Images.Caption: Recalled Vevor handrail, model number LTFSSHSDDZJSFS001V0
Recalled Vevor handrail, model number LTFSBSHXDDZJSFS01V0
Recalled Vevor handrail, model number LTFSBSDDZJSFS0001V0
Recalled Vevor handrail, model number LTFS1BBXGMLFS0001V0
Recalled Vevor handrail, model number LTFS2BBXGMLFS0001V0
Recalled Vevor handrail, model number TFBGWXLZHS1JGNHKIV0
Vevor is printed on a label located near the bottom of the handrail

Injuries.Name: Vevor has received five reports of the handrails breaking, resulting in injuries, including one head injury.

Retailers.Name: Available at Amazon.com, eBay.com, HomeDepot.com, Lowes.com, Vevor.com, and Walmart.com from February 2020 to November 2024, priced between $57 and $109.

Distributors.Name: Sanven Technology Ltd., dba Vevor, of Rancho Cucamonga, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of injury due to potential welding failure while in use

Remedies.Name: Stop using the handrails and request a full refund from Vevor. Pre-paid shipping labels will be provided for returns. Alternatively, consumers can send photos of the disposed product to recalling@vevor.com. Vevor is reaching out to all known customers.

recalls.metaDescription: Sanven Technology recalls Vevor handrails due to injury risks. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: Sanven Technology is recalling its Vevor stainless steel cable railing kits, designed for both indoor and outdoor applications. These kits feature cable support posts available in black and silver, with 'Vevor' labeled on the top of each post. The product can be identified by its P/N or P/C number found on the outer packaging, or by specific characteristics if the packaging has been discarded. Key features include color, number of holes, overall height, cross-sectional dimensions, and hole location on the posts.
recalls.Title: Sanven Technology Recalls Vevor Stainless Steel Cable Railing Kits Due to Entrapment Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can contact Sanven Technology Ltd. at 855-599-6320 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or via email at recalling@vevor.com.

Products.Name: Vevor Stainless Steel Cable Railing Kit

Images.Caption: Recalled Vevor cable railing kit with Cable Support Post model number JZLGZHS9142UYBR4V0
Recalled Vevor cable railing kit with Cable Support Post model number JZLGZHS1067CSWRBV0
Recalled Vevor cable railing kit with Cable Support Post model number 1JZLGZ106755UOBB9V0
Recalled Vevor cable railing kit with Cable Support Post model number LGZY106.72.55KZF0V0
Recalled Vevor cable railing kit with Cable Support Post model numbers 1JZLGZ91455YMDM3LV0 and 1JZLGZ91455YMDM3LV0-0801
Recalled Vevor cable railing kit label

Retailers.Name: Available online at HomeDepot.com, Lowes.com, Walmart.com, Amazon.com, Wayfair.com, and vevor.com from May 2021 to September 2024, priced between $32 and $40.

Importers.Name: Sanven Technology Ltd., of Rancho Cucamonga, California

Hazards.Name: Entrapment hazard due to the bottom hole's placement on the cable support posts.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the kits immediately, restrict access to children, and reach out to Vevor for a full refund. Vevor will supply pre-paid shipping labels for the return of the recalled kits. Alternatively, consumers may send photographic proof of disposal or destruction of the posts to recalling@vevor.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Sanven Technology recalls Vevor cable railing kits due to entrapment risks. Contact for refunds and safe disposal instructions.
